title: Crafts for SMPs
description: Recipes that will be good for survival servers with your friends!
body:
This datapack adds new crafting recipes to the game (*-removed original craft also), now - v1.1:

- Light golden apple*
- Light golden carrot*
- Light turtle helmet*
- Enchanted golden apple
- Totem of undying
- Exp bottles
- Cobwebs
- Trident
- Elytra
- Fast Obsidian
- Fast crying obsidian
- Uncraftable wool
  
In the future I want to port it to more versions and make variations for different types of smps
